archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Vibrant Adventure
core_concept: Sunset & Terracotta. A warm, sun-drenched, tactile interface that feels like the golden hour of a road trip. We avoid sterile tech blues and pure whites, opting for bone-white backgrounds with high-contrast pine green and sunburnt terracotta accents.

Onboarding.layout: Full-screen image hero with gradient overlay at the bottom. The content sits at the bottom third of the screen.
Onboarding.image_treatment: Use 'hero_onboarding' image. Dark gradient overlay from bottom up to 60% height to ensure text contrast.
Onboarding.typography: H1 for welcome text 'Travel together, effortlessly.', label for 'GET STARTED'.

Home.layout: Header with user greeting and avatar. Horizontal scroll for 'Upcoming Trips' (large cards). Vertical list for 'Past Trips'.
Home.cards: Trip cards should have the destination image covering the top 60% of the card, with trip name, dates, and member avatars overlapping the bottom edge of the image.

TripDetail.layout: Collapsible image header. Top Tab Navigation (Pool, Flights, Itinerary, Members) utilizing segmented controls, not generic underlined tabs. Segmented control background: #F0EAE1.

TripPool.layout: A large 'Total Raised' circular or thick semi-circle progress ring at the top. Below: horizontal bar charts for categories (flight, hotel, transport). List of members and their contributions.
TripPool.cta: Fixed bottom floating 'Contribute' button with Stripe branding integration.

Flights.layout: Card-based vertical list. Each flight card mimics a premium boarding pass. Includes airline logo/icon, large flight number, prominent departure/arrival times, and a 'Check-in Countdown' badge in #E06D53.

CreateTrip.layout: Multi-step form. 1. Destination & Dates, 2. Cover Photo Selection, 3. Pool Goal Setup. Use large input typography.

InviteShare.layout: A 'ticket' style view showing the Invite Code in massive monospace font. A prominent 'Share Link' secondary button and a list of 'Already Joined' members with overlapping avatars.

hero_onboarding.description: Four friends share smiles and laughter in a convertible during a sunset road trip. Represents vibrant group travel.

trip_cover_tropical.description: Stunning tropical beach with palm trees against a vivid blue sky.

trip_cover_amalfi.description: Aerial view of Positano colorful hillside buildings.

trip_cover_mountains.description: Picturesque view of Hallstatt village, Austria.

flights_empty_state.description: Two women taking selfies by airport window. Use for empty states in flights tab.
